title: Article
description: Foundation/reference article for The Builder Weekly

summary.description: One-paragraph summary for SEO meta description and llms.txt

topic.description: Short tag for the specific topic within the pillar (e.g., 'agent-payments', 'verification', 'solo-founders')

author.description: GitHub username of primary author (tbw-ai for autonomous, or human username for commissioned)

contributors.description: Additional contributors who edited or improved the article

lastReviewedAt.description: Last time the article was reviewed for accuracy and freshness

ogImage.description: Path to OG image, relative to article folder

citations.description: External sources cited in the article

relatedArticles.description: Slugs of other articles this one references
